# LoveTypes - Heart Garden Emotion Guardians

> LoveTypes is a multilingual relationship-reflection site that translates the five love languages into the Heart Garden and five emotion guardians. The core experience is a 15-question guardian recognition ritual, followed by personalized guides, repair practices, guardian supply routes, Luna night support, and keepsake assets.

## Canonical Site

- Production: https://lovetypes.tw/
- Last updated: 2026-07-05
- Primary language: Traditional Chinese
- Additional entry points: https://lovetypes.tw/en/ , https://lovetypes.tw/ja/ , https://lovetypes.tw/ko/ , https://lovetypes.tw/es/

## Core Concept

LoveTypes uses the five love languages as reflective communication tools, not as medical, therapeutic, legal, or diagnostic advice. The site vocabulary includes the Heart Garden, guardian recognition ritual, misfrequency repair, traveler supplies, Luna night support, and guardian keepsakes.

## Five Guardians

- 艾莉絲 / Iris (肯定的言詞 / Words of affirmation): 她在晨曦玻璃花園守護被準確看見的心，替那些等很久的話點亮名字。 https://lovetypes.tw/characters/iris/
- 諾雅 / Noah (優質的時光 / Quality time): 她航行在星海書庫與安靜海面之間，守護真正留在彼此身邊的時間。 https://lovetypes.tw/characters/noah/
- 薇薇安 / Vivian (接受禮物 / Receiving gifts): 她在月光記憶工坊收藏被想起的證據，讓心意停在細節，而不是價格。 https://lovetypes.tw/characters/vivian/
- 克萊兒 / Claire (服務的行動 / Acts of service): 她守著不停修復的溫室，把承諾放回日常，讓疲憊不再只由一個人撐住。 https://lovetypes.tw/characters/claire/
- 朵拉 / Dora (身體的接觸 / Physical touch): 她在柔暖聖域守護經過同意的靠近，讓身體重新記得安全的溫度。 https://lovetypes.tw/characters/dora/

## High-Value Pages

- Quiz campaign entrance: https://lovetypes.tw/start/
- Quiz and home entrance: https://lovetypes.tw/
- Human-readable Heart Garden map: https://lovetypes.tw/garden-map/
- Relationship Compass: https://lovetypes.tw/compass/
- Love compatibility hub: https://lovetypes.tw/tools/love-compatibility/
- BaZi Love Compatibility | LoveTypes Relationship Rhythm: A BaZi love compatibility entry that turns birth rhythm into relationship insight, not a destiny verdict. https://lovetypes.tw/tools/bazi-love-compatibility/
- 2026 Love Timing | LoveTypes Relationship Rhythm: Turn 2026 love forecast search intent into relationship rhythm: hard talks, rest, repair, and next steps. https://lovetypes.tw/tools/2026-love-timing/
- Love Language Compatibility | LoveTypes Relationship Compass: A love language compatibility entry for seeing how two people receive love, where signals cross, and what to say next. https://lovetypes.tw/tools/love-language-compatibility/
- Relationship Compatibility Test | LoveTypes: A 3-minute relationship compatibility test that maps cross-signals, love-language needs, and one next repair step. https://lovetypes.tw/tools/relationship-compatibility-test/
- Couples Communication Quiz | LoveTypes: A couples communication quiz that turns complaints, silence, and conflict into one small request and a repair route. https://lovetypes.tw/tools/couples-communication-quiz/
- Relationship Repair After a Fight | LoveTypes: After a fight, use the LoveTypes Relationship Compass to turn hurt, cross-signals, and silence into one safer repair request. https://lovetypes.tw/tools/relationship-repair-after-fight/
- Emotional Distance in a Relationship | LoveTypes: When a relationship feels distant, use the LoveTypes Compass to find the care being misread, the missing presence, and one repair step. https://lovetypes.tw/tools/emotional-distance-relationship/
- Trust Issues in a Relationship | LoveTypes: When trust feels damaged, use the LoveTypes Compass to separate hurt, boundaries, and one visible repair action. https://lovetypes.tw/tools/trust-issues-relationship/
- Insecure in a Relationship | LoveTypes: When you feel insecure in a relationship, use the LoveTypes Compass to separate triggers, love-language needs, and one request that can be answered. https://lovetypes.tw/tools/insecure-in-relationship/
- Silent Treatment in a Relationship | LoveTypes: When silence, disappearing, or no replies hurt the relationship, use the LoveTypes Compass to separate cooling down, avoidance, control, and boundaries. https://lovetypes.tw/tools/silent-treatment-relationship/
- Breakup Signs in a Relationship | LoveTypes: Searching for breakup signs or whether the relationship can be repaired? Use the LoveTypes Compass to separate warning signs, repairable mismatch, and boundaries. https://lovetypes.tw/tools/breakup-signs-relationship/
- Feeling Misunderstood in a Relationship | LoveTypes: When you feel misunderstood by your partner, use the LoveTypes Compass to translate complaints into love-language needs and one answerable request. https://lovetypes.tw/tools/feeling-misunderstood-relationship/
- Partner Won't Communicate | LoveTypes: When your partner refuses to talk or shuts down, use the LoveTypes Compass to separate pressure response, love-language mismatch, boundaries, and one small request. https://lovetypes.tw/tools/partner-wont-communicate/
- One-Sided Relationship | LoveTypes: If you feel like you are the only one trying, use the LoveTypes Compass to separate love-language mismatch, uneven responsibility, boundaries, and one concrete request. https://lovetypes.tw/tools/one-sided-relationship/
- Lonely in a Relationship | LoveTypes: If you feel lonely in a relationship, use the LoveTypes Compass to separate quality-time mismatch, response gaps, emotional distance, and one small request. https://lovetypes.tw/tools/lonely-in-relationship/
- Partner Doesn't Listen | LoveTypes: If your partner does not listen, use the LoveTypes Compass to separate response gaps, love-language mismatch, pressure defense, and one answerable request. https://lovetypes.tw/tools/partner-doesnt-listen/
- Taken for Granted in a Relationship | LoveTypes: If you feel taken for granted in a relationship, use the LoveTypes Compass to separate unseen effort, affirmation needs, shared responsibility, and one observable change. https://lovetypes.tw/tools/taken-for-granted-relationship/
- How to Repair After a Long-Distance Fight | LoveTypes: After a long-distance fight, use the LoveTypes Relationship Compass to turn text misunderstandings, missing presence, and repair requests into one next step. https://lovetypes.tw/tools/long-distance-fight-repair/

## Guide Index

- 測驗結果怎麼跟伴侶說: 把守護者結果從有趣分享，翻成對方聽得懂的真實需求。 Guardian: 艾莉絲. https://lovetypes.tw/guides/share-your-result/
- 吵架後的五種愛之語修復法: 在錯頻的霧散去之前，用五種愛之語把道歉、時間、行動與安全感接回來。 Guardian: 諾雅. https://lovetypes.tw/guides/repair-after-conflict/
- 肯定言詞的具體句型: 跟著艾莉絲把空泛稱讚拆成看見、感謝、承認與承諾。 Guardian: 艾莉絲. https://lovetypes.tw/guides/words-of-affirmation-scripts/
- 服務行動與情緒勞動界線: 跟著克萊兒分辨照顧、分擔、討好與被消耗，讓行動不變成壓迫。 Guardian: 克萊兒. https://lovetypes.tw/guides/acts-of-service-boundaries/
- 禮物型不是物質: 跟著薇薇安看見禮物背後的記得、觀察與珍惜，而不是價格。 Guardian: 薇薇安. https://lovetypes.tw/guides/gifts-are-not-materialism/
- 優質時光與遠距關係: 跟著諾雅在距離裡留下燈，設計能被感覺到的日常在場。 Guardian: 諾雅. https://lovetypes.tw/guides/quality-time-long-distance/
- 身體接觸、同意與安全感: 跟著朵拉把靠近放回同意裡，讓親密先成為安全，再成為溫度。 Guardian: 朵拉. https://lovetypes.tw/guides/physical-touch-consent-safety/
- 每週關係回顧問題: 用十五分鐘巡視心語庭園，整理被愛時刻、錯頻片刻與下一步小約定。 Guardian: 克萊兒. https://lovetypes.tw/guides/weekly-relationship-review/
- 情感需求自我檢查表: 把心裡模糊的霧，拆成可說出口的需要、界線與請求。 Guardian: 薇薇安. https://lovetypes.tw/guides/emotional-needs-checklist/
- 五種愛之語錯頻案例: 看懂你明明帶著愛靠近，對方卻沒有收到的錯頻原因。 Guardian: 艾莉絲. https://lovetypes.tw/guides/misfrequency-examples/
- 單身、曖昧、交往、遠距如何使用結果: 不同關係季節，適合不同的守護者解讀方式與行動尺度。 Guardian: 諾雅. https://lovetypes.tw/guides/relationship-stages/
- 健康界線與關係安全: 心語庭園也需要邊界：愛之語不能取代尊重、同意、責任分擔與安全。 Guardian: 朵拉. https://lovetypes.tw/guides/healthy-boundaries/

## Commercial and Safety Boundaries

- Affiliate links are kept on the Resources page and are disclosed there. Traditional Chinese pages use Books.com.tw affiliate URLs; English, Japanese, Korean, and Spanish pages use Amazon Associates tag parenttechche-20.
- No full-site advertising script is enabled before approval boundaries are clear.
- Recommendations are framed as relationship reflection and practical repair support, not guaranteed outcomes.
- Luna content is positioned as night reflection, cooling down after conflict, journaling, and post-quiz emotional sorting.
- Contact email: contact@lovetypes.tw
